cards.characters: 啤啤熊，你今日真係好曳好曳啊
cards.jyutping: be1 be1 hung4 nei5 gam1 jat6 zan1 hai6 hou2 jai6 hou2 jai6 aa3
cards.english: Teddy, you've really been very naughty today.

cards.jyutping: cin1 kei4 m4 hou2 lyun6 gam3 zau2 ji5 hau6 jiu3 gwaai1 gwaai1 dei6
cards.english: Don't run around. Be good from now on.

cards.jyutping: deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3 ngo5 jing1 sing4 nei5
cards.english: I'm sorry, Peppa, I promise you.
